name: kimdim-angular-test-explorer
description: Discover and run Angular spec files in the VS Code Testing view.

angularTestExplorer.workspacePathOverrid.description: Optional workspace path override used to locate angular.json. Relative paths resolve from the active workspace folder.

angularTestExplorer.commandTemplateOverr.description: Optional test command template. Supported placeholders: {workspace}, {project}, {spec}, {watch}, {testNamePattern}.

angularTestExplorer.defaultWatchMode.description: Default watch mode passed to Angular CLI test runs.

angularTestExplorer.projectsBasePathTrim.description: Optional path prefix to trim from discovered spec labels in the Testing view (for example: apps/tableside/projects).

angularTestExplorer.parallelizeByProject.description: Run tests from different Angular projects in parallel while keeping runs within the same project serialized.
